root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no --,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.salary_amount ,( select salary_real from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as salary_amount ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.salary_pure_amount ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.position_amount ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_amount ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as date_of_birth ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_prename ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code) AND (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no) AND (sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) -- AND ( ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no BETWEEN :s_mem AND :e_mem ) AND (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0') /*WHERE*/
ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ASC ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ASC
